channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ohio State has slowly paced itself on offense all the way to the national championship game
item.description: Ohio State has been purposely pacing itself on offense all season, huddling more and trying to limit the number of snaps in each game of what the Buckeyes hoped and anticipated would be a long run. “I know it sounds crazy, the huddle, it’s almost like going back in time,” coach Ryan Day said.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Japanese phenom Roki Sasaki's MLB deal could spur chaos in Latin America. Here's why
item.description: Roki Sasaki can sign with Major League Baseball teams during a nine-day window starting Wednesday, an unusual free agency that caused a domino effect among Latin American teenagers whose unofficial agreements are on hold pending his decision.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mike Tomlin doesn't feel the Steelers are stuck, but all options are on the table heading into 2025
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — There is a sameness to the way the Pittsburgh Steelers keep ending their seasons. Yet Mike Tomlin shrugged on Tuesday when asked if it feels as if the Steelers are “stuck” after their fifth first-round playoff exit in eight years, all of them embarrassing in their own way.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs' 2024 first-round pick reflects on rookie year
item.description: Rookie center Graham Barton has taken the NFL by storm and reflected on his first year in the league.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How Atlanta is adjusting security plans for college football game after deadly New Orleans attack
item.description: Atlanta leaders say the New Year’s Eve vehicle attack on Bourbon Street in New Orleans has helped guide their security plans for college football’s national championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Martin, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Oakland Coliseum buyers closing in on Alameda County’s approval of massive sale
item.description: AASEG promises to transform the property into a new hub of restaurants, retail, housing, entertainment and live sports.
item.dc:creator: Shomik Mukherjee, The Mercury News

item.title: What is the NHL's 4 Nations Face-Off? Here's what you need to know
item.description: The NHL and NHLPA is hosting the 4 Nations Face-Off tournament Feb. 12-20. Here is everything you need to know to get ready for it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams overwhelm Vikings 27-9 in wild-card playoff game moved to Arizona because of LA wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Sam Darnold tried to step up in the pocket to find a receiver but there was nowhere to go. The blue and yellow wall that was the Los Angeles Rams' defense closed too fast.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Novak Djokovic and Andy Murray chatted mid-match thanks to the new Australian Open coaches' box
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic stood with his hands on his hips, listening intently to Andy Murray — his longtime on-court rival and now, stunningly, his coach at the Australian Open — between sets at Rod Laver Arena. Murray pantomimed the swing of a two-handed backhand.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penn State running backs Kaytron Allen and Nick Singleton are returning in 2025
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — The running backs want to run it back at Penn State. Nick Singleton and Kaytron Allen both announced Monday that they plan to return to the Nittany Lions for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas man accused of sending Caitlin Clark violent messages on X: court docs
item.description: A Texas man is accused of sending sexually violent messages from his X account to Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and then driving to Indianapolis, court documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Christy, Fox 5

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Expect road closures in Santee for 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships
item.description: The City of Santee is hosting the 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships this weekend, and several road closures will be in place Sunday morning into the early afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs Bonus: Tampa Bay looking for similar results in Wild Card rematch against Washington
item.description: With the Buccaneers gearing up for their fifth straight Post Season run, Barber joins a special episode of Bucs Bonus to talk about what the team needs to do to contain rookie quarterback phenom Jayden Daniels and the Washington Commanders offense that has leveled up since the two teams met in week
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Brayden Point reaches 600 career points in Lightning's 4-1 victory over the Bruins
item.description: Brayden Point reached 600 career points with a power-play goal, Andrei Vasilevskiy made 27 saves, and the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Boston Bruins 4-1 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Jazz lose on half-court shot at the buzzer
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz' attempt at its first three-game winning streak of the season ended in heartbreaking fashion. Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
